summary: Bootstrapped the Next.js workspace with Next 16/Blockly deps plus lint/typecheck/migrate scripts so the backend stack is runnable (package.json:1-35, .eslintrc.cjs:1-3, tsconfig.json:1-16, next.config.mjs:1-6). Added SQLite helpers, schema/migrations, and the three progression puzzles that auto-sync into the DB on first access (lib/db/sqlite.ts:1-45; lib/db/schema.ts:1-101; lib/db/migrations.ts:1-47; lib/puzzles/data.ts:54-245). Defined telemetry schemas and analytics helpers, then implemented the session, batch, and analytics API routes on top of them (types/telemetry.ts:1-81; lib/telemetry/ingest.ts:1-162; lib/telemetry/analytics.ts:1-148; app/api/session/start/route.ts:1-12; app/api/events/batch/route.ts:1-16; app/api/analytics/replay/[attemptId]/route.ts:1-14). Delivered migrate/seed utilities and the telemetry smoke runner that posts to /api/session/start and /api/events/batch for offline verification (scripts/migrate.ts:1-26; scripts/seed_demo_data.ts:1-34; scripts/telemetry_smoke.ts:1-78). Not run: npm lint/build/telemetry:smoke because node_modules are not installed in this workspace.

Landing, puzzle, and analytics flows now ship with the styled layout, Blockly workspace + WebGL runtime, telemetry buffering, and dashboard visualizations; please run `npm run lint` / `npm run build` to validate locally.
